overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking through a misty, atmospheric forest. The scene follows a winding dirt path through dense pine trees with fog and muted blue-gray lighting, creating a somber, exploratory mood.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside forest trail with scattered trees

events.description: lake water disappears from view as path turns inland

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path with swords on his back, moving away from the water

entered.detail: Dense cluster of tall evergreen trees forming the forest canopy
Winding dirt trail through the forest with visible grass patches
Calm body of water visible through the trees on the right side
Atmospheric fog hanging between the trees reducing visibility

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a misty forest trail with a lake visible to the right. The path is surrounded by tall pine trees and atmospheric fog, with the water gradually disappearing from view as the path curves inland.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest interior with winding trail

events.description: path curves left and becomes more enclosed by dense vegetation

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the trail curves through increasingly dense forest with rocky outcrops

entered.detail: Rocky terrain and boulders on the left side of the path
Dead fallen trees and logs scattered in the undergrowth

segments.scene_description: The trail curves left into denser forest, leaving the lake behind. Rocky hillsides appear on the left while fallen logs litter the right side. The trees feel closer and the atmosphere becomes more enclosed.

events.description: dark cave entrance becomes visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaches a dark cave entrance on the right, continuing along the narrowing forest path

entered.detail: Dark opening in the rock face suggesting a cave or hollow
Massive rocky outcrop with moss and dark crevices

segments.scene_description: The path leads toward a dark cave entrance on the right, surrounded by large rock formations. The forest becomes more enclosed and darker, with the canopy blocking most of the sky and creating a mysterious, cave-like atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty forest trail that gradually transitions from an open lakeside path into a dark, enclosed cavernous area. It begins with Geralt walking along a foggy trail flanked by tall pine trees, with a lake visible to the right that slowly disappears from view as the path curves inland. As the trail bends left, the environment shifts toward a denser woodland where rocky hillsides emerge on the left and fallen logs litter the ground, making the atmosphere feel increasingly confined. The scene then narrows further as the canopy blocks the sky, plunging the forest into shadow before turning toward a dark cave entrance surrounded by massive rock formations.
